candidates.why: Clearly short-term financing debt and explicitly current in nature.
Likely contains current financing-related liabilities and may capture short-term borrowings/current maturities excluding separately reported leases, but label is somewhat broad.

variables.notes: No clean 'Borrowings, current' label is present. 'Other current finacial liabilities' appears to be the best current financing bucket and leases are separately disclosed, so adding it with 'Bank overdrafts' is plausible, but the label is broad enough to warrant review for possible non-debt content or overlap.
